org.arakhne.neteditor.figlayout

Interface FigureLayoutConstants

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ForceBasedConstants
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractDirectionBasedFigureLayout, AbstractFigureLayout, BasicGridBagFigureLayout, ForceBasedFigureLayout, GanswerSugiyamaFigureLayout

    public interface FigureLayoutConstants
    Constants the figure laying out.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int HALF_MINIMAL_HORIZONTAL_PADDING
      Half of the minimal horizontal padding between two figures.
      static int HALF_MINIMAL_VERTICAL_PADDING
      Half of the minimal vertical paddind between two figures.
